PowerShell($file = "c:\\Users\\João Vinicius\\Documents\\Finza\\Repasse\\apresentacao_cto_13-05-2026.html"; if \(Test-Path $file\) { $lines = @\(Get-Content $file\).Count; [PSCustomObject]@{ FullPath=$file; Exists=$true; Lines=$lines } } else { [PSCustomObject]@{ FullPath=$file; Exists=$false } })
